title: Making Drosophila Artificial Hemolymph
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e9lj1","text":"This is a protocol for making artificial hemolymph (AHL) for Drosophila brain dissection and imaging.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"36fii","text":"Make sure to make the stock solutions ahead of making the final AHL buffer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Stock Solutions 3M NaCl MW: 58.44 87.66g to 500mL 1M KCl MW: 74.56 37.28g to 500mL 500mM CaCl 2 MW: 147.00 14.7g to 200mL 500mM MgCl 2 MW: 203.3 20.33g to 200mL 500mM NaH 2 PO 4 MW: 155.99 15.59g to 200mL *200mM Sucrose MW: 342.30 34.23g to 500mL *100mM Trehalose MW 378.33 3.78g to 100mL *250mM HEPES MW: 238.31 11.92 g to 200mL *Store at 4°
Make 100 mL of AHL from the stock solutions

108mM NaCl 3.6mL of 3M NaCl 5mM KCl .5mL of 1M KCl 2mM CaCl 2 .4mL of 500mM CaCl 2 8.2mM MgCl 2 1.64mL of 500mM MgCl 2 1mM NaH 2 PO 4 .2ml of 500mM NaH 2 PO 4 10mM Sucrose 5mL of 200mM Sucrose 5mM Trehalose 5mL of 100mM Trehalose 5mM HEPES 2mL of 250mM HEPES 4mM NaHCO 3 .4mL of 1M NaHCO 3 **add NaHCO 3 last to avoid formation of precipitates
Add ddH 2 O to a final volume of 100 mL
Check osmolarity of the solution to ensure that it is at ~265 mOsm
creator: Zachary Freyberg
